string 2: What in the world...?
Something huge is... running alongside us?
Is that a Titan?!{next}
That thing is massive!{next}
All that really matters is who's got the bigger heart!{next}
What can we do if we can't even see our enemy?!
Hey, you two!
Think we can get out through there?
Will you be all right, Inori? We'll be on the roof of a speeding train...
I'll be fine. Let's go!
Graaagh!
Look at that! Way up ahead!
Is that a Titan, too?!
I think the war might have already started...!
I have to stop it. After all...
...that's the whole reason I was born.
...because I'm the Great Guardian!
Gwaaah!
Oh, no...! We're going to crash into it! Get down, everyone!
Look out! Please clear the way!
Gwah...?

Passengers, please hold on to the nearest handrail! There's
an obstacle straight ahead!
Gwa... Gwaaah!
Where'd it go...?
It's over there! Come on. Let's get off.

Wow... It sure doesn't look like it was just sent flying.
It looks pretty much fine to me.
This is not the time to be impressed! Here it comes!

The barrier gave us some trouble, but once we got in,
there was nothin' but small fry.
Now, give us your treasure, before we take yer life!
Ngh!
Stop right there!

You're that strange Digimon and the humans from Central Town!
What're ya doin' here?!
That's our line. What in the world are YOU doing here?

Ain't it obvious? We're here to save our reputations after
you embarrassed us in front of the boss!

If we get our hands on the treasure that's here and bring it
back with us, we'll be able to stand proud again!

Don't even THINK about gettin' in our way! 'Cause we'll pulverize
you for sure this time!
Great Guardian, my apologies, but I cannot leave this throne...
...in order to protect the precious treasure of the Digital World...
Got it. I'll take care of these scumbags.
Let's go!

He fights pretty good for a fledglin', eh? That human
ain't bad, either...

We'll be done in if we don't take 'em serious. We learned
that the hard way in Central Town.
But we're ready this time! We won't lose like last time!

Let's show these fleas just how much pride and strength we
Titans got!
How's this!
Damn it!
Not once, but twice now!
Argh!
Now, give it up, already!
What is that?!
Titamon!
Hmph. Losers, not just once, but twice over...

But no matter. That pesky barrier is gone now thanks to
your efforts.

Bask in the knowledge that your contribution allowed me
to bring in reinforcements.

Now, hand over that treasure. ...Or do you plan to
keep resisting?

Even if I were out of options, I would never hand over
the treasure.
Hmph.
Is that... the treasure?{next}
Then disappear from my sight—any and all who stand in my way!
Hngh!

This treasure... it contains the power of the hero Chronomon! It
must not fall into the Titans' hands!
I entrust it to you...! Please take it and flee!
You want us to flee into this hole...?{next}
Is this... a gate?{next}
Does this mean we can return to the human world...?{next}
You think I'd allow that to happen?
...Aegiomon!
Wait!
Great Guardian! You must stay behind.
What?
The humans will return to their world, but we must defend ours!
But Titamon is after them! Inori is in danger...!

There is nothing greater than fulfilling your destiny! Tell me now!
What is it that you should be doing?
I... made my choice.
That night, under that starry sky...
...I decided to protect Inori... That we'll be together forever!

What.. what are you saying? You are the Great Guardian—the Digimon
charged with the duty of defending this world!

How can you choose to protect that human!? Are you abandoning us?!
Abandoning this world?!?!
That cannot be allowed to happen!
Aegiomon!
Inori!
Oh, good. You're awake.
Sorry. I know you just woke up, but we've got to hurry.
It looks like we lost the treasure...
It floated off that way. I think this must lead to the human world.

The Titans are chasing after the treasure, too. They said
something about "calling in reinforcements"...

So we have to move quick! It won't be pretty if the humans
get the Titans and the treasure dumped in their laps!
...What is it, Inori?
Junomon was so angry... I made you do a terrible thing.
Are you sure you didn't want to stay there?
Not at all. I made my own choice.
I'm a Digimon, yeah... but I was actually born in the human world.

The Titans will come pouring into the human world. I can't
let that happen!

And besides... I haven't even returned the favor for that time you
saved me in the Shinjuku underground.
I'm sure I could never replace your little brother...

...but I'll always stay by your side! I'll never leave, and I'll always
make sure you're safe.
My place isn't the Digital World. It's by your side, Inori!
